summary: Critical failures: (1) Workflow references non-existent fixtures/ directory (line 25 Copy-Item would error immediately, blocking test job). (2) Missing Set-StrictMode and $ErrorActionPreference in Test-ResultsAggregator.psm1. (3) Significant code duplication: Invoke-AggregateTestResults.ps1 (lines 43-76) duplicates Invoke-ResultsAggregation function from module. (4) Weak parameter validation across all functions. (5) Generic error handling with `$_`. (6) Fixture files not provided; workflow structure unverified and unfunctional—would fail in act. Solution incomplete and non-deployable.
